---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change — it must trace to observed evidence (the No-Build rule)
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["needs-evidence"]
---

<!-- The compiler core is FROZEN (see docs/02-architecture/20-compiler-specification.md#governance).
     Features are built only when justified. A request that can't answer the gate below is closed. -->

**Which user asked?**
**How many?**
**How often?**
**What evidence?** <!-- validation-board row, session, analytics — not "I think…" -->
**How will we measure success?** <!-- the behaviour change we'd expect -->

**Which No-Build justification applies?**
- [ ] repeated user feedback
- [ ] observed user behaviour
- [ ] measurable operational need
- [ ] explicitly chosen strategic objective

**Proposed change:**
**Does it touch the frozen compiler core?** <!-- if yes, needs an ADR amending the spec -->
